title: Supply Chain Manager - Jet Freight Logistics - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Jet Freight Logistics - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Jet Freight Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Jet Freight Logistics:
Jet Freight Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jet Freight Logistics!
